creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi Colin, 

The port must be correct, I can install it without any issues, so the package 
must be correct as well, since it is built from the port. 
I suppose you have some problems with the source you try to install from, and 
the pkg_add errors indicate just that the packages are not available in 
that source. What is your PKG_PATH set to? Could you try installing 
amavisd-new from the official FreeBSD 6.1 CDs? They are considered the 
most reliable source. Please give me a feedback if you could solve this 
issue in this way or not. 

Regards, 
Gabor
